blockers.evidence: cosign verify against the immutable upstream index returned no signatures found
release tag 4.39 resolves to an unsigned upstream source commit
the upstream container release workflow disables provenance and has no attestation step

controls.evidence: ADR-0020 accepts the exact upstream commit, tree, archive checksum, and immutable Dockerfile frontend for the bounded local lab
the exact digest passed the vulnerability gate before keyless signing bound it to the recorded issuer, identity, and workflow SHA
Cosign verification returned transparency-log-backed entries hashed in artifact 8321634543
Cosign and GitHub attestation verification bind the artifact to workflow SHA 159e8601302cd6306d9d3bd9d847ea39275a9bf8
the non-root scratch image ran weed mini with writable /tmp for its default local sockets and cache
run 29359679038 published to a run-scoped quarantine tag and promoted sha256:cbf49d40f1d879dd4baba866fb2f203aba971023f3843253fbd4028469093e96 only after all gates and evidence retention passed

assessment.rationale: The hardened Shirokuma source build fail-closes on every recorded build input, provides writable weed mini temporary storage, completes Critical=0/High=0 scanning before signing and provenance publication, tolerates repeated valid attestations, and promotes the trusted tag from a run-scoped quarantine tag only after evidence retention. Signature, transparency, SLSA, SBOM, scanner freshness, and generated evidence hashes bind to the exact digest. The upstream image remains blocked.

requirements: pin the admitted exact digest in the resident-image ledger and Flux resources
verify Flux reconciliation and functional S3 smoke on mac-studio-solo
record SSD impact and backup/export behavior
retain teardown and rebuild evidence for parent Issue #26
